events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the condition is an Air Admittance Valve (AAV) installed in a location the adopted code (IPC 917 / UPC 909) prohibits — likely as the sole vent for the system, in a plenum/unventilated space, outdoors unprotected, or on a sewage ejector without a listed sewage-rated AAV. This defeats vent-to-atmosphere requirements, risking trap siphonage and sewer gas intrusion, so it's a **fail** at high risk, requiring relocation/replacement of the AAV and re-inspection before close-in.
